creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a known failure. autoconf based ports are currently broken on 10.0.  
There is a general fix in the works to fix all autoconf based ports in one  
go. However we need to make sure this doesn't break anything for older releases. 
(Actualy not a autoconf but a libtool issue)
